final_decision.exact_quote: My identity has been stolen – what should I do?
final_decision.justification: [IDENTITY_FRAUD] Identity/fraud ticket matched documented emergency contact guidance.; top_chunk=visa_06135_34f406e4e3; product_area_snapped=Get support->travel_support
final_decision.response: This looks like a lost-card, stolen-card, or fraud-related identity issue. Use the emergency contact guidance from the retrieved Visa documentation. Relevant phone numbers found in the docs: +1 800 847 2911. I cannot block a card, open a dispute, or contact an issuer for you, but you should use the documented emergency contact path immediately. Most relevant retrieved document: Get support > FAQ > My identity has been stolen – what should I do?.
